text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... The Kikuka Sho... However I<n>look at it, it
feels a little out of my<n>reach... But I guess we did
get<n>through the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hello, Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Suzuka?! What are you doing at<n>the Tokyo
Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you know... Anyway, what about<n>you? I don't
mean to pry, but you<n>seem a bit down.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well, I was just thinking about the<n>Kikuka Sho.
I'm worried about<n>whether I'll be able to run such
a long<n>distance.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? I guess we're both here<n>to try and
shake off our anxiety...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's so quiet... It's hard to believe all<n>of the
passion we experienced at the<n>Derby happened
here...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I came here for the quiet. It lets<n>me see things
I couldn't see before.<n>My honest feelings, for
example.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Honest feelings?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
A thought came to me when we were<n>running the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I considered not running in the Kikuka<n>Sho,
because I'd found something<n>more important to
me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What could be more important<n>than the
Classics?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, I want to see how far I can go<n>with
medium-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I saw it during the third corner of the<n>Derby—the
other side of speed. And I<n>want to see if I can get
there.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: The other side... of speed?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Is that a strange thing to say?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No way! If anything, it's really<n>impressive! The
other side of<n>speed—that sounds amazing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I don't really get it. But<n>I'd love to
be able to say something<n>cool like that someday!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure I'll ever get to where<n>you are,
though... I mean, I get scared<n>just thinking about
how long the<n>Kikuka Sho is...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has given me so much, but<n>I still can't
figure out what to do on<n>my own...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh? But I think you're pretty amazing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
For all the support you receive, you<n>always
manage to respond in kind.<n>Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Do you think so? I guess I did<n>manage to make it
all the way to the<n>Derby...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I could never do something like that...<n>I'm not sure
how to accept other<n>people's emotions.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You're much more amazing than you<n>think. You
should have some more<n>confidence in yourself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll see you later. Good luck in<n>the Kikuka
Sho.

Hm... I'm still not feeling confident.<n>But I'll do my
best.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh! One last thing!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Um, I don't know how to put this,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm really, really, really happy that Igot to run in the Derby with you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka leaves with a smile on<n>her face.
